title: athyrium congruum
intro: Athyrium congruum, also known as the Western Lady Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium congruum include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Athyrium congruum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
